title: The Beloved Vagabond
writer: William J. Locke, Arthur Wimperis, Walter Creighton
actors: Maurice Chevalier, Betty Stockfeld, Margaret Lockwood
plot: In London at the turn of the century, Gaston du Nerac is due to marry his fiancee, Joanna. When her father finds himself in financial trouble, Gaston reluctantly accepts help from a rival - on condition that he never sees Joanna a...
